# Open Thread 428.5 + Zagreb Update

**From:** Astral Codex Ten <astralcodexten@substack.com>  
**Date:** 2026-04-08T18:45:24.000Z

---

View this post on the web at https://www.astralcodexten.com/p/open-thread-4285-zagreb-update

Midweek open thread to announce: the Zagreb organizers have changed the meetup  [ https://substack.com/redirect/9d4b6573-bcb6-46e4-8ce2-07ddda5f4780?j=eyJ1IjoiMXlnZjcifQ.KOUIeBfeCRzhIwFnKXyQigR4j0VpF-SZzascYhSZunw ]location. It’s now Importanne Galleria (Galleria Business Center), 1st Floor (Microblink), Trg Drage Iblera 10, Zagreb. Everything else, including the time (8PM Fri) stays the same.

Unsubscribe https://substack..sn7SnGkgzdBu285S0OX2WH2sATnwIJdFvccmr0cAYMg?

---
